ddls:
CREATE TABLE "surveys" (
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each survey */,
  "survey_name" TEXT /* Descriptive name for the survey */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the survey's purpose and objectives */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date when the survey starts */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date when the survey ends */,
  "topic_id" INTEGER /* ID of the topic the survey covers */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region where the survey is conducted */,
  "demographic_id" INTEGER /* ID of the demographic group targeted by the survey */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the survey */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the survey */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the survey was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the survey */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the survey was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("survey_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_surveys_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_surveys_topic_id FOREIGN KEY ("topic_id") REFERENCES topics ("topic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_surveys_demographic_id FOREIGN KEY ("demographic_id") REFERENCES demographics ("demographic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_surveys_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_surveys_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "responses" (
  "response_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each response */,
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* ID of the survey the response belongs to */,
  "question_id" INTEGER /* ID of the question the response is for */,
  "respondent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the respondent */,
  "response_option" TEXT /* Option selected by the respondent */,
  "response_text" TEXT /* Text response for open-ended questions */,
  "count" INTEGER /* Count of respondents selecting this option */,
  "response_date" TEXT /* Date when the response was recorded */,
  "response_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the response was recorded */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the respondent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("response_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_responses_question_id FOREIGN KEY ("question_id") REFERENCES questions ("question_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_responses_survey_id FOREIGN KEY ("survey_id") REFERENCES surveys ("survey_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "questions" (
  "question_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each question */,
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* ID of the survey the question belongs to */,
  "question_text" TEXT /* Text of the question */,
  "question_type" TEXT /* Type of the question */,
  "required" INTEGER /* Whether the question is mandatory */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the question */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the question was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the question */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the question was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("question_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_questions_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_questions_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_questions_survey_id FOREIGN KEY ("survey_id") REFERENCES surveys ("survey_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "response_options" (
  "option_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each response option */,
  "question_id" INTEGER /* ID of the question the option belongs to */,
  "option_text" TEXT /* Text of the response option */,
  "order_number" INTEGER /* Order in which the response options are displayed */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the response option */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the response option was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the response option */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the response option was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("option_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_response_options_question_id FOREIGN KEY ("question_id") REFERENCES questions ("question_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_response_options_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_response_options_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "topics" (
  "topic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each topic */,
  "topic_name" TEXT /* Name of the topic */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the topic */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the topic */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the topic was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the topic */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the topic was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("topic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_topics_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_topics_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the region */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the region */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the region was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the region */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the region was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_regions_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_regions_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "demographics" (
  "demographic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each demographic group */,
  "demographic_name" TEXT /* Name of the demographic group */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the demographic group */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the demographic group */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the demographic group was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the demographic group */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the demographic group was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("demographic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographics_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographics_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, researcher, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for user authentication (hashed) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* User status (e.g., Active, Inactive) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Comma-separated list of permissions or roles */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
